The red color is a beautiful burgundy color which I am a huge fan of. This a great find for anyone looking for a great wig! The hair is nice and soft and just falls like a beautiful little waterfall in the front. I love how it frames my face when I wear this. The ombre effect on it is done to perfection! Fantastic find.

title: Very nice eyelashes for the price
text: These are some nice pairs of false reusable eyelashes. They are easy to use and look great. You get 4 pairs and some tweezers to help applying them. They are made out of faux mink. I like how they make my eyes look and give my eye lashes a nice full look, great for a night out in town. These are comfortable to wear all night long since they are fairly light. I would definitely recommend them for evening use and not for day time use since they have a bit of a dramatic flare to them.

title: Very easy to use
text:
This colored hair wax works very well. It is perfect for those Halloween or cosplay occasions. If I would have gotten a different color than gray I guess I could have used it on other occasions for like accent strikes of hairs.

It is easy to use and leaves a similar feeling behind as if you used some of those colored hair sprays. The hair is a tad stiff, just like it is when you use hair wax. I don't use those kinds of products often so it is always a bit weird to me when I can't just run my fingers through my long hair.

It washes out easily without any problems. When you apply it and wash your hands it comes of easy as well. This is a very easy to use product without any issues and not very expensive so you can't really go wrong with it.

title: Nice facial cream
text:
This facial cream comes in a cute little pump dispenser.It is a gentle cream that has a pleasant scent to it that only lingers for a short little time. It quickly absorbs into your skin and leaves a beautiful looking skin behind that is very soft.

My skin had no negative reactions to it, no reddening, no rashes, nothing. My skin felt nice and moisturized when using this. I don't really have a lot of dark spots so it is tough to tell if those are lightened when using this cream.

title: Just ok in my book
text:
This goat milk cleanser is very gentle. It almost felt like a lotion when I used it. So the description that it does NOT lather is 100% accurate. I was a bit confused by that to be honest so yes read the description. It works very well that is true. It was almost completely without scent, it may have had some very mild scent but I couldn't describe what it smelled like.

To me it was weird to wash your face with something that felt more like a lotion than anything else. So this only gets an ok since it wasn't outstanding in any category really. I had no negative reactions to it and it is super gentle but that is about it.

title: Great brushes!
text:
These wooden brushes are just plain fantastic. The bristles are nice and stiff but not too stiff to hurt you. Stiff enough however to stimulate to provide a good scrub, wet or dry for that matter. You get 2 brushes in this set and one handle that you can put on either brush.
One is a nice round brush with nylon bristles that are good for scrubbing your feet that cleanses, softens and smooths the skin. The second brush is an oval brush that just has the stiff boar bristles that helps to exfoliate and smooths the skin.

Using these brushes dry helps cleanse your skin but also stimulates your lymphatic system. It promotes blood circulation, helps excrete toxins and relaxes your muscles. Plus it just feels great! You can switch the handle between these two brushes for the one you need it for which is convenient in my eyes. I really like using these and they are just good for you and feel fantastic.

title: Do not care for the scent and only works ok
text:
This serum contains Vitamin C, Hyaluronic Acid, Argireline Peptides, Vitamin E, Red Marine Algine and some others, all ingredients that are good for your skin and are similar to their face moisturizer. The consistency of the serum is however different and you need a lot less of this product I found. A tiny bit goes a long way!

This product comes in cute little pump dispenser that works very well. After I used this product I didn't think my skin felt super soft like it felt after using some other serums in comparison, it felt ok no doubt but not like with some other serums so that was a bit disappointing. I also found this product did not smell very good, similar to their moisturizer. I am not sure what it is about this line. Thankfully that scent does not linger for long.

This product is definitely not for me, and I think this line at this point may not be for me all together since I am striking out at 2 for 2.

title: Just ok in regards to moisturizing and smelt bad to me
text:
This face moisturizer containing hyaluronic acid and Vitamin C, plus some other good ingredients is not bad. It also contains glycolic acid, salicyclic acid, Vitamin A and E and really has a lot of good ingredients for your skin. It is lightweight and applies nicely to your skin. This moisturizer absorbs very quickly but your skin doesn't feel super soft after you apply it. Yes it is soft but I have other moisturizer that make my skin feel a lot softer when I use them.

It comes in this really cute pump dispenser that is very stylish. What I did not like about this moisturizer is the scent of it. I can't pinpoint what it smells like but I did not particularly care for it. Thankfully the scent does not linger very long on your skin. The other thing I did not understand that in the directions of using it it says " follow with moisturizer or makeup". Why would I have to use a moisturizer after using this moisturizer? Pretty confusing if you ask me.

All in all this product is just ok in my book. It felt ok on my skin, smelt bad to me at least and the instructions were weird to say the least. For this price you can get some other products that work better and definitely smell better!

title: Overprized and missing brush cleaner
text:
This is a decent makeup brush set. Would I pay $40 for this, NEVER. First the bag is very nice. The 4 brushes that come with it are also very nice, but are they basically worth $10 a brush, no. For that kind of money you are better of buying a Sigma brush. I was also supposed to get a makeup brush cleaner in this, but that was missing.

In this set you get a powder brush that was nice and fluffy and worked well. You also get a foundation brush that was also very nice. The flat cream concealer brush worked well and you also get a concealer detail brush that again worked really well. None of these are outstanding and any better than you can find in the beginner sets you can get for like $10 to $20 depending on the set size. So getting the bag and supposed brush cleaner that I did not get does not warrent the $40 in my eyes.

title: Just ok in my book
text: This is a nice little concealer. I used it on some scars as well as skin blemishes and it worked alright for the most part. It was true to skin color. It covered the skin blemishes beautifully but not the scars. I had no issues blending it as long as you blend it right away and it look good after you were done. I would not use it as an eye shadow primer however because of its properties.

title: Worked ok for me
text:
This pen basically is used to "fill in" larger pores with one end and the other end (black felt tip of sorts) helps smoothen it all out. The "pink" end is their primer that basically fills in whatever you want to cover up.

This "primer" has no scent to it and is very soft and almost melts into your skin. It has about light to medium coverage.

title: "Delicious" scrub
text:
I really like this lip scrub. It tastes deliciously of peach and is nice and gentle. Let's face it you don't want something that is too harsh on your lips and scrub the heck out of them. You want something nice and smooth that gently scrubs away the excess skin that is oh so annoying and tempts you into biting it off.

This scrub has Vitamin E, jojoba and coconut oil and some other nice ingredients and as I said tastes deliciously of peach. I personally am a huge fan of peach and this tastes 100% of peach and doesn't have a weird artificial flavor which is great. Thanks to the oils in this scrub your lips feel great after your wipe of the scrub.

title: Beautiful but pricey
text:
This is a very nice, well made scrunchie, but what I do not understand is, why one scrunchie is $17? I have gotten a 52 pack for $8 before and they are all very nice scrunchies. Yes I understand that the silk does not damage the hair and therefore doesn't cause split ends, but at this price it better blow dry my hair for me while I am still sleeping.

It is beautiful, the color is a very nice deep emerald green, it is very well made, the silk has no pulled threads or anything, but I don't think I would be willing to spend that kind of money on just one. If this was a 5 pack or so I would be ok with it even for silk.

title: Great!
text: My wife loves this. Hoping to get another one soon.....

title: A big Nope for me.
text: As a licensed professional I do not recommend this product. My spa owner purchased this from Amazon, when I went to try it on a PAYING CLIENT,  the glue did absolutely nothing. If the glue doesn't work then the service cannot proceed. I have done this service on many clients with a different brand and had success. This product not at all.

title: Not hand friendly
text: Not hand friendly but get the job done

title: Five Stars
text: Absolutely my FAVORITE!

title: Bad taste
text: It has a bad taste

title: Better quality than others on the market
text: I am willing to pay a few dollars extra for these razors. I've bought cheaper razors but they cut me and get dull and get rusty very fast. The Dorco brand has protective barriers on the razor so you won't cut yourself.  They work for a long time and do not rust!  My first set last 4 years before I had to replace them.  I recommend only buying DORCO.

title: Defective.
text: Defective product. The strap was too small for my head but replacing it is not possible without ripping the hair out. The attachment on one side was in the hair on the front instead of the back of the head. So it would not work even if the stap did fit unless you folded it.  In addition, some of the hair was already falling out. I added a picture of the side which was not defective. I have it two stars but the color matched my hair exactly.

title: happy
text: i bought for structure gel and builder gel.  I am happy with the brushes.

title: It’s GREAT
text: I’m pleasantly surprised, it’s a nice headband wig. I thought it was going to look like plastic, but it doesn’t it’s a nice texture. This is great for the price! Throw on an go!

title: Affordable and of Quality
text: I'm very happy with this product! Beautiful design and high quality results

title: Too small for pin curls
text: Useless. To small to use for pin curls.

title: Great matt lip color
text: Love this matt lip color!

title: Amazing diffuser!
text: Great customer service, and super cool diffuser!

title: Doesn't really work, used multiple times
text: I used it in 5 different parts of my body, and hair grew back immediately on my legs (the most noticeable body part), even after multiple uses weekly.  I followed the instructions exactly, and did not receive the results I wanted.  Overall,  with the price I paid and how it didn't work, I would not recommend this to others.

title: Plant Mister
text: This plant mister is perfect. I bought it it use on my air plants. It sprays a very fine mist and my plants are doing great!

title: Perfectly Good Shampoo
text: I love a peppermint scent, and I love when there are those oils to make your skin feel refreshed.  I thought that might be the case on your scalp with this shampoo, but it didn't.  I like the mix of peppermint and lavendar, and I think it worked just fine.  Overall, it works as well as any other shampoo.

title: Great for Acrylic/Dip Powder
text: I've recently started doing my own "dip powder" nails, which lasts SO much longer than gel.  Plus, I don't have to worry about getting a fungus from the salon.  They can be pretty tough to take off, so you HAVE TO have Acetone to get them off.  I can use this stuff on a little cotton ball, wrap my nail and cotton in tinfoil, and let them soak for a bit.  This does the trick and quickly brings the polish/powder off.  In short, it does what it's supposed to do.

title: Does not work as advertised (AT ALL)! Don't waste your money!
text: These are impossible to use! Once each eyelash is connected to the applicator, then they won't connect to each other because the magnetic in the applicator is stronger! And forget trying to manually apply. Picture trying to balance one eyelash on your eyelashes while attaching another from the bottom! The top eyelash will jump off to connect to the other one before you can even get it close! Don't waste your money.

title: Great way to save money
text: I had this item sitting in my cart for a long time. I finally placed my order because the kit would basically pay for itself after one use. I was very impressed with everything. The colors are beautiful and last. Will definitely be ordering more colors! So happy with my purchase and my only regret is not buying it sooner!

title: Love
text: So good...and I'm picky.

title: WASTE OF MONEY!
text: So Cheap! They Melt & Snap Apart as Soon as The Body Heat From Your Scalp Touches It!

title: Highly recommend
text:
I highly recommend getting a bears straightener and this one in particular.
If you have never used one, they work miracles. My beard hair is curly and seems to have a mind of its own. After using this the hair is much straiter and easier to style and manage. It also helps my beard to appear thicker and fuller.
The device is extremely well built and comes with many accessories for your beard needs.

title: Strong hold
text: Works great. Strong hold, odor isn't my favorite. Only need to use a little to go a long way.

title: Clumpy Eyelashes
text: This is probably the worst fiber lash mascara I have ever used! It just clumped all my eyelashes together! I just looked like I have clumps for eyelashes! Not good at all!

title: Awesome produc!
text: This product is AMAZING!!! It is so much healthier for your nails than dip and so much easier to file down. It does take a little getting used to but overall amazing!!!

title: Perfect for holiday!
text: I absolutely love the colors in this set! This is a perfect holiday color palette and I will definitely use this for Christmas! I also love that it come with a brush for excess powder. This is a very convenient color kit.

title: Good for Holding Hair in Place......  As a ponytail holder, no.
text:
I do find these hair clips quite sturdy! I have been using them to hold a pony tail. But not as strong to hold a ponytail on securely. The teeth are very small, and there is no grip of the hair. The clip will fall.

Many years ago, I had a ton of hair and now, sadly, it has thinned out. I now can use hair clips to hold the entire hair. I like that the clips look simple, they are not bulky and fit easily on my hair. I usually use one and/or two on the pony tail. I can wear this clip on my hair in public and it is not very visible. I am getting a lot of use right now. I like the clips! The Clips will hold a ponytail, but eventually will slide. Just use it for holding the hair back in place.

title: It's the perks you are paying for !
text:
This Norelco shaving system is just that, a system! That's what one pays for because the closeness of the razor is not near what the hand held manual razor can do. We have used this, face for hubby, legs for me, and bottom line is the shave is not as close.

There are great perks here! The multi-purpose display is excellent, indicates how much time you have left before recharging and the time is plenty! The storage case and charging stand are neat features. But for the quick shave, you need to use it too long, going over and over! It sure looks good though! ...Rizzo

title: It Works for What We Wanted It For
text:
Husband grew a beard the moment he was put on blood thinners, and he has it trimmed once a month, but sometimes that's not enough. When it gets too long he tends to look like Grizzly Adams. I would keep it tamed with scissor trims, but this works much better; he can do the trim himself, and also trim his cheeks and mustache. We haven't tried it on trimming the hair at the back of his neck.

He does not like that it is only USB and you have to buy a wall plug adapter to charge it. I guess they figure most people have them now, but it should come with one. That's just being cheap.

title: Cheap... stuck together like sandwich bags
text:
They aren't your typical shower caps. I thought I was getting a deal but they are so cheap I can barely use them twice. They are sealed together on either side so if you don't open them carefully you can rip them. They also don't stretch very much so it's not for long hair.
Don't waste your money.

title: Hate this stuff.
text: I hate this stuff. It is like clown makeup. Only Cole cream will take it off. It will clog your pores and make you break out. Only use if you really need full coverage. It would be better to head to ultra and just get a shade darker than you normally use for powder. Just avoid powders with Zinc….zinc turns white in stage lighting.

title: Great for my 7 year old
text: So cute! My 7 year old has loved playing with them. And best of all, they wash right out!! Love it!

title: Gorgeous, but texting on stick makes it difficult to use
text: They are so heavy and gorgeous that I hate to give them such a low review. The ornate heads are beautiful. They are so sturdy and are a great length for a low bun. However. The textured design that comes from the head and down the stick on some of them rip at my hair making it difficult to get them in and out of a tight bun.

title: Best makeup wipes I've used!
text: I was skeptical because of the price and I've always used Neutrogena wipes and they have always worked great. But these were so much cheaper with good reviews that I thought I would give them a try and I love them! They take the makeup off (eyeliner, mascara, foundation, lipstick - all of it) and leaves my face feeling softer and more moisturized than any other wipes I've used.

title: Works excellent a lot of power only downside is the base ...
text: Works excellent a lot of power only downside is the base not heavy enough what's the tip over as the water gets lower I still give it 5 stars for effectiveness

title: Crochet
text: I love ordering my hair from Amazon and this was great hair!

title: Pricey but Decent
text: This has worked pretty well for me over the past couple weeks of use, but I can’t say it’s worked better than products that cost half the price. It’s a good moisturizer, but it’s overpriced.

title: A Multi-Benefit Exfoliator
text: Though a bit pricey at $20 for 3.4 ounces, this face scrub does deliver solid results. It smells great, very fresh and masculine. It thoroughly exfoliates my skin and leaves it feeling soft, clean, smooth and moisturized. I've found that it's great to use before shaving, as it preps the skin by smoothing and moisturizing it.

title: Impressed!
text: Never heard of this brand but it was definitely the packaging that caught my attention. The saying "never judge a book by its cover" does NOT apply in this CASE. PLEASE try out this mascara. My lashes looked significantly longer and thicker with out any flakes or clumps. A very long lasting mascara  for a relatively decent price. Also, considering how long lasting it wore, the removal was insanely easy. I love this mascara!

title: A Good Addition
text: This is a very decent palette for the price. I like the shades offered, and they are of good quality.

title: Excellent in All Areas
text:
This is a very unique and effective product.

Used with a light pre-styler on medium-length hair:

Scent: It's a light scent. Warm and slightly spiced. Very pleasant and masculine.
Consistency: Extremely creamy. Becomes slightly tacky when emulsifying.
Styling: Smooth through the hair at first, with increasing tug the more you style. This is not a problem for me and is part of getting great hold from a product.
Finish: Slightly shiny at first, but becomes much more matte as it dries in the hair.
Hold: Legitimate all-day hold without becoming too rigid to restyle.

This is one of my new favorites. Seriously good in all areas, which is so rare. TheSalonGuy has a real winner with this one.

title: High Quality Face Moisturizer
text: I really like this moisturizer. The consistency is extremely soft and smooth, and it feels incredible on my skin. It moisturizes wonderfully and feels like it actually fortifies the skin, making it feel thicker and stronger. The scent is very fresh and it absorbs well. I am already noticing (after a few days) a slight lightening of the skin under my eyes, which is exciting. A bit pricey, but definitely high quality.

title: Really Nice
text: These bottles are very good quality. All in perfect working order. They’re a great buy for the price.

title: A Soft, Moisturized Finish
text: Pricey, but it’s a high quality scrub. Great texture and exfoliation.

title: Fresh and Moisturizing
text: Aside from being a tad overpriced for a daily face wash, this stuff is great. It smells like cucumber - clean and fresh, it has the consistency of aloe vera gel but a bit thicker. The lather is low-foam. It feels great on my skin, and leaves it feeling soft and moisturized. Definitely a high quality product.

title: Great Hold, but Sticky
text:
Applying to medium length hair with a light prestyler.

Scent: Very spicy. Christmas spices.
Texture: Waxy clay. Very thick.
Application: Thick and a bit tough to emulsify in the hands. A bit sticky during application.
Styling: Pretty responsive, but you have to work quickly.
Finish: Very high hold. Fairly low shine, but not matte.

title: Great Hold and Finish
text: This is a great product. The hold is strong, the finish is truly matte, and the price is a lot better than comparable clays, waxes and fibers. It has a light, masculine scent.

title: Cool and Moisturizing
text: This is definitely a "cooling" body wash. It makes my skin tingle and would be excellent in the summer months when you need to bring your body temperature down. The scent is like menthol-eucalyptus, but a bit sweeter. The lather is very thick and smooth, and it rinses away leaving my skin feeling cool and moisturized. The only reason for the 4-star rating is the price. $15 is a bit much for 6 ounces of product.

title: A Great Combination
text:
I love the combination of this shampoo and conditioner. Both smell like sweet coconut.
The shampoo has a thick and luxurious lather and definitely feels like it adds volume to my hair.
The conditioner is thick, but light, a bit like a body butter. It softens my hair and leaves it extremely soft and silky.
The only reason I can't give these products five stars is because I think they're a bit overpriced. Yes, they create great results, but so do a lot of comparable brands that are less than half the price.

title: Overpriced for What You're Getting
text: This shampoo smells great. The scent is very natural, but unfortunately it's not. Rather than using the pricier essential oils of peppermint and lavender, the company uses synthesized fragrance. The lather is decent and washes your hair about as well as any bargain-priced brand from the supermarket shelf. I did notice that it leaves my hair feeling a bit flat. There is no reason for the high price aside from name familiarity, as this brand is used by some hotel chains.

title: Deep Cleaning
text: I really like the consistency of this face wash. It's like wet clay, with a gentle and pleasant scent. It has just the right amount of lather and it spreads very easily over my face. The only drawback is that is will dry your face out. I suppose this can be countered with a basic facial moisturizer.

title: Excellent Quality Body Wash
text: This body wash is excellent. The scent is delicious, like real orange, the lather is thick with small bubbles, and it noticeably moisturizes your skin. The only drawback is the price. It's currently listed for $10 for 4 ounces, which is basically travel size.

title: Messy but works great!
text: I wasn't expecting my mirror to get a cleaning also! I was excited to finally have a water pick so when I received my package I immediately set it up and studied the directions. Once I was confident, I began and as soon as i turn it on, water went everywhere! It all ricochet ed all oclver my bathroom counter and mirror. Safe to say that you literally need to use this in the shower. But besides that, it has many attachments, different speeds and does a great job!

title: Didn't work for me.
text: This is my own personal experience with this lash growth enhancer and my own opinion. I did not notice any difference in my lashes since I started using it a month ago. I've documented my experience with pictures every 3 days. I gave it 2 stars and not 1 because I've seen that it's worked for others but I guess it isn't compatible with my biology. I'm  bit disappointed.

title: best ever
text: One liter almost lasted a year.... I forgot how much I spent but it's worth it

title: I have mixed feelings on this
text: This was a new thing for me to try.  I liked it but find myself not using it.  I thought maybe my wife would like it but it seems that she is not using it either.  It seems to take more soap than just using a washcloth.  I do like how it feels when I use it.  It feels nice on my body.  I won't give up yet, I will keep trying it.

title: Just what I needed!
text: I ordered these as replacements. They arrived on time and were just what I needed. They were affordable and practical. Definitely worth purchasing.

title: Potential.
text: Besame classic lipstick (Forever Red 1925) is creamy, moisturizing and conditioning. The color is a bright red, which gives you just the right amount of pop, especially if you are wearing a solid color (like black, blue or grey). I wish it was a deeper red, but regardless I will make it work. It makes my lips feel soft and smooth. It isn’t drying at all. It doesn’t bead on your lips. I wouldn’t consider this a matte finish, but it isn’t really shiny either. It has decent staying power (you can eat or drink while wearing it). Overall, this is a terrific lipstick to put in my rotation. I’d recommend it.

title: Time to change out my brushes.
text: I like that this set (Fragrantshare) contains a variety of (make-up) brushes. You get 18 brushes in different shapes and sizes. You get everything from a foundation brush, to one that you can apply eyeshadow with. They (black) handles are easy to hold and use. The bristles are made of animal hair.  So, far I haven’t noticed any shedding. Everyone knows that you should change out your brushes every once in a while. So, give these a chance. Did I mention, this set is inexpensive, under $21 on Amazon.

title: Moisturizing and hydrating.
text: The Ikoo Infusions hair mask was surprisingly great. It is moisturizing, hydrating and nourishing. This product comes in a round (6.8 oz) container. The thick (light green) cream smells refreshing and bright.  Some of the ingredients are macadamia oil, honey extract and camellia oil. It is non-greasy but does leave a slight shine. This product is cruelty, vegan, sulfate and paraffin free (Peta approved since that is important for some consumers). I have coarse, sometimes dry hair, that after using this product made it more manageable after just one treatment. I used it as a deep conditioning treatment. It left my scalp and hair feeling refreshed and clean. I’d recommend it.

title: $50 for a plastic brush?
text: Clearly Amazon has mis-priced this brush. $50, for a plastic handled brush and firm bristles? First, I am ok with the plastic handle. It is easy to grip and hold. And since it is plastic, you don’t have to worry about it looking faded after several washes (I do clean mine) like you do with the wooden ones. I’m even ok with the firm bristles (nylon and boar), because I have coarse hair and I’m not tender headed.  I like that it smooths the hair easily.  What I don’t like is the PRICE. I can’t believe they expect people to pay $49 for this brush. Yikes! And the sad thing is that it didn’t even come in pretty packaging. Just in a simple white box. So, while I am sure I will use this brush, I can’t get over the price. 2 stars

title: Leaves your skin feeling cool and refreshed.
text: LaClaire (Beverly Hills) Clarifying Cleanser is a delight on the skin. Simply add a dime sized amount, with a little water and distribute on your face with your hands (or if you prefer a loofah). The small (1.6 ounce) pump bottle is simple to use and doesn’t take up too much space in the cabinet or on the counter. There are some pretty nice ingredients that include tea tree oil, salicylic acid and aloe. I’ve used the product for a few days now and have not noticed any dryness or irritation. Nor have I noticed any redness or rashes. The scent of the cleanser is not strong (smells like tea tree oil) and does not linger long. And finally, what I like the most? This company has made a product in a bottle that is reusable. I really like companies who have a philosophy to reduce their impact on the world. Being socially aware of how their products can affect the environment and actively doing something about it is a company that I can support. You can reuse the bottle and add liquid soap or other things.

title: Just what he needed.
text: Ordered this for my son and he really loves it. He finds that this kit is helpful because there are a variety of tools that address most skin issues. He also likes there is a kit that holds all of the tools which means that he can keep them together and doesn't have to look for them when needed.  And finally, this kit was affordable and even more reasonable than some that I have seen in several discount stores.

title: Undecided still.
text:
This is perhaps one of the most difficult reviews that I have written in a while. Usually I know immediately if the product is a hit or miss, but Vitabrid C12 is different. I can’t decide. I’m torn. After using VC12 for about 3 weeks, I am still unsure of the results.

The concept: Vitamin C is slow released thru the skin by mixing a small amount of VC12, with water or a moisturizer, onto the face and neck. The results, brighter, smoother and firmer skin. The powder comes in a convenient small bottle (about the length of your thumb) with a small spoon (used for measuring). Simply mix the appropriate amount - I use about 2 spoonfuls since I put it on my face and neck- with a lightweight moisturizer. I didn’t notice any tightness, irritation or itching after I applied this to my skin (i.e., face and neck). I simply apply my makeup as usual. With that being said, I haven’t noticed anything bad either -no additional breakouts and no nasty white film (left on my face from bad blending). But I also haven’t looked in the mirror and said “wow” or “gosh, this is like a facelift in a bottle moment”. Not to mention that this product takes a little more effort than my usual skincare regime. I am not use to mixing products before I use them. **Therefore, I am going to give this product 3 stars BUT continue to use it for a little longer to see if I am wowed. After all each container is believed to last about 3 months. If I notice something earth shattering in the next month or so, I will amend my review. Otherwise, this review will stand.

title: Not for larger heads
text: If you have larger head, these don't stay on. They're too tight and it causes them to slip strangely. I like the button idea though, and they worked fine for my regular headed coworkers.

title: A bit disappointed
text: While these are cute they definitely did not slide around easily on the nail in order to get them into the right position all.

title: Love it!!!!!!!!
text: Love this wig priced reasonably hair is silky soft it curls perfect length and I was able to get it same day

title: Not healthy for me
text: I've never had high blood pressure but my blood pressure goes up really high when I use this product. When I stop using it goes back to normal within 3 days. I've ran this experience twice to determine if its actually the Hairprin and I've gotten the same results both times.

title: Very pleased
text: I do like this model, comes with a charging cord but no adapter for the wall, so I plug mine directly into my CPU.  I like that the cover locks, and read the instructions, it won't start until you have held the button for 3 seconds.

title: my new favorite mask
text: this mask is amazing. my face feels so soft and smooth after using it. pores look smaller too

title: Love em.
text: Nice! Same quality as I've had from others, but cheaper and with cases! Glass works so much better than other types of files. I'll never go back!

title: Felt like it was made out of thin cardboard
text: These felt like there were cardboard pieces inside the material so I had to return them. I was so excited to get these but once I felt them by excitement turned to disappointment. These are not worth 13.99 at all.

title: It gives a nice minty tingle the whole time
text:
I'll admit, I was skeptical. I have never used a mud mask before. But I needed something! My skin was bumpy, irritated, and had lots of blackheads. I tried all the face washes and cleansers and they didn't do much. So I tried the Radha Beauty Dead Sea Mud Musk. I was very impressed! I left it on for about 7 minutes. It gives a nice minty tingle the whole time. If it starts to itch, you've left it on too long, get it off! I put a wet, hot cloth on my face for a moment to loosen it a bit, then just wipe it off, bit by bit.
My skin was SO SMOOTH, clear, and nice looking! I actually got compliments! I use it once to twice a week, but no more than twice. It really, really helps the look of my skin.
I was very skeptical but now I'm a convert!

title: Mac = wonderful
text: Love

title: Love this! Great service
text: Love this ! Great service too

title: Weak, does not grip the tube strongly enough.
text: Simply not strong enough to squeeze the paint from my oil paint tubes.  A cheap plastic version worked much better.

title: Tons of styles
text: Tons of styles to choose from ranging from soft glam to dramatic.  Would be great for making gift sets for friends!

title: Not the best quality
text: The quality of these items is really not that great. The combs and cape are pretty flimsy and everything feels inexpensive In general. This set would work if you really need it to but it'd be better to just pay slightly more for a better pair of scissors.

title: Meant for lighter skin tones!
text: I have a medium tan skin tone and this did not work for me at all. It's waaaay too light. Definitely meant for fair to light medium skin tones. This stuff is pretty pigmented so I wouldn't try it if you think it might be too light. It probably will be. Goes on pretty opaque and pigmented, it's almost a light/medium weight foundation. It does go in silky smooth and has a nice finish. I also like the pump and packaging. A bit of a scent to it, but it's not too bad. Wish they made this in more shades!

title: Prefer the regular ones
text: I've tried the regular ones and love those. These don't stretch quite as well and feel a bit tighter when I wrap it around. I think they're alright but I prefer the normal ones much more.

title: Great little set but unfortunately the light broke very easily:(
text:
The polishes in this set work wonderfully and the packaging is very nice and would make an excellent gift! Unfortunately I bumped the lamp off my table and it fell about 3 feet and stopped working...I didn't think it was much of a fall so I was pretty surprised it didn't turn on anymore.

The lamp was compact and easy to use, fit one hand at a time. Fortunately I have another lamp but pretty bummed this one broke so easily.:/

title: Dense, thicker band
text:
(307) These lases are a little more dense so they definitely give the look of wearing false lashes, in kind of a more dated kind of way. I feel like the more spread out and whispy lashes are a lot more trendy these days. Band is quite thick also. Besides the band, the lashes themselves are pretty good quality and don't have a plastic sheen to them which is great. Price and quality is comparable to drugstore.

(309) Also have a thicker band but are much more Whispy and have that fluffy instagram lash to them. Very pretty! I like these a lot better than the 307's. I'd give these a 5 and a 307 a 3 so since they're the same brand, I will average the review to a 4.

Hope this review is helpful!

title: Decent mascara but VERY hard pokey applicator!
text:
I have pretty long and decently full eyelashes so this mascara worked well for me as a daily mascara.

Cute packaging, nice slim shape with cute design.

I didn't find it to be too volumizing, but it does a good job at defining and lengthening.

Formula was not very wet from first opening so this may dry out faster than others if not used up.

My main issue with this mascara is the hard plastic applicator. It has longer and shorter hard bristles along the sides. I'm by no means a beginner with mascara, but for some reason I've poked my eye with this mascara applicator a couple of times already. The bristles just seem really hard and sharp!

This could just be me having a problem for whatever reason, but thought I'd mention.

Hope this review is helpful!

title: Melts away makeup, smells great
text:
Was interested in what this was going to feel like but I guess "jelly" really is the closest consistency to describe this.

It more viscous than water and has a bit of "bounce" to it but doesn't feel oily or greasy. I apply it straight on my face, rub it in a bit, then add a bit of water to my hands, lather, then rub again. Then rinse k

I have combo skin with drier cheeks and this doesn't leave my skin feeling stripped or dry. Still feels moisturized.

This product smells of roses pretty strongly but I actually love the way it smells so I don't mind at all.

Wouldn't really recommend for eye makeup though, I did find it to sting a bit so I'm just gonna stick to micellar for my eye makeup.

Hope this review helps!:)

title: Super cute plus great deal!!
text:
These scrunchies look great in person, especially the plain scrunchies, theyre a beautiful silk like material that has some shine to it. The plain ones also have a heavy duty elastic in them. I have super thick long hair and these do a great job of keeping my hair in a bun.

Ive definitely overpaid for scrunchies at urban outfitters when these are just as nice if not nicer for sooo much cheaper. They're great!:)

The little barettes are just okay, I find they pull my hair but the scrunchies are totally worth it.

title: Can also be used as cream blush!:)
text:
A pretty MLBB velvety lip color. The formula isn't nearly as drying as typical matte liquid lips. More of a velvety mousse like texture.

I have medium tan skin and I'd say this is a nude pink shade on me so it may be a bit light for deeper skin tones.

I discovered you can also use this as a cheek color as well! I dab a bit on the back of my hand and apply it from there. It's pretty pigmented on the cheeks so starting with less is better.

title: Feels like it creates an extra step...
text:
I tried this a few times and couldn't help but feeling like it left residue on my face. I end up using my normal face wash afterwards to feel properly cleansed.

To be fair I don't wear much face makeup so perhaps this might work better for someone that wears foundation. I did try to remove my eye makeup with this balm and it was too greasy/thick and also stung my eyes, whereas my micellar water won't do that.

The scent is a nice clean rose scent and I like the packaging, but I don't think I'll continue to use this. Seems like more work than is necessary and kinda makes me feel like it will clog my pores in the long run...

title: Higher quality beauty sponges than other brands!
text:
You never know what you're gonna get with some of these beauty sponges, but this is definitely one of the good sets.

The sponges are actually soft and don't absorb as much product as other sponges. I recently tried another brand that looked exactly the same but they were so hard and rubbery. These are soooo much softer in comparison. I don't feel like I'm softly punching my face like I do with the others😂

Very easy to clean, after use and have no weird smell or anything. I haven't used the puffs or brush yet but I'm going to attempt to use the puffs for powder or maybe even jelly products. The brush would probably work well for concealer or eyeshadow primer. It has soft bristles and a solid handle.

Overall I think this is an awesome quality set for a great price!!

title: Not very much hair
text: I think this might work for people with smaller heads or smaller faces but I felt it wasn’t wider enough or thick enough to look good on me. The hair was very soft and real looking though!

title: Sturdy files
text: I actually use these for crafts such as sanding off rough edges on resin castings. And they work great for that.

title: Nice sized bottles.
text: Nice small bottles for travel. I like being able to take my own shampoo with me because I hate the stuff they have in the hotels.

title: Rating: Negative 5 stars... Don't buy
text: What a HORRIBLE product! Initial unboxing looked promising until the STENCH hit my nose! There was no relief from it. I gently soaked it in cold water with a baby shampoo and gently stirred it in one direction. The water instantly turned dark muddy brown. I let it soak in clean water 3x until the murky, dirty water ran cleaner. Then added a nice rich conditioner and a small spritz of argan oil. But these two little wigglets literally lost their appearance but still kept that terrible smell. Please save yourself the effort; use a different manufacturer. If I could give this item a -5 (negative 5) stars I would! I know they won't refund me after I washed it.

title: Gel polish
text: This set comes with all colors displayed, a top coat, base coat, and matte top coat, also a nail file. The colors are pretty similar to the pictures, but slightly different. These colors show as very opaque and even with 3 coats they arent like the pictures. The green is more neon/clear and required 3 coats. The rest I only did two coats and cured for 60 seconds each coat in a 120w lamp. The purple is more magenta and has some pink undertones. The yellow is a little more lime green as well. I used dehydrator and a primer and when I put the base coat on, it would not smooth out and was lumpy. I'm not sure if it was the dehydrator and primer or the base coat itself, but I had to scrape it off and opted to note use it at all. I've only had the polish on for about a day, but have done a lot and there is no chipping so far.

title: Wig
text: The wig is softer than most synthetic wigs and did not tangle for me and my son was playing in it. It is layered so it gives a more realistic look and has a little wave or curl at the ends. The part isnt really believable even with the lace. I would suggest a cap or hat over it. It did shed slightly for me when I was combing my hands through it.

title: Water flosser
text: Using this item made me feel like I was in the dentist's office. It was easy to setup and use. I plugged the poer adapter in, filled it with water, added the nozzle until it clicked, and pushed the dial to turn it on. There are different nozzles and in the instructions it says one is for general use, one for periodontal pockets, and another for fresher breath. There were some other accessories as well. It comes with a storage for those accesories. I used the general use nozzle and noticed that the dial has no arrow to tell you what strength you're putting it to, you would only know while the power is on and the stream is going. On the lower setting, the water was spurting, not flowing smoothly, but did on a higher setting. There is a suspension control to pause it while using it. After you are done, it instructs you to dump the water. Overall, it worked as it should and I gave it four stars because of the spurting and no arrow on the dial.

title: Very secure
text: They are not as long as I expected. I don't think I paid attention to the length, but if i hook two together they work. They are very secure though. The sellers contacted me about the item and were very nice and helpful.

title: Super soft and good quality
text: I ordered these because they looked super soft and the details in each bow was beautiful. Received the first batch and they seemed tighter than what I wanted. Before I could contact the seller, they contacted me stating a batch was in circulation that was to tight. They shipped me out a new pair at no cost and even added an extra bow. I really appreciate the customer service. The new bows are beautiful and are super soft on my daughters kinky curly hair.

title: Works on my super-sensitive skin
text: My skin is very sensitive so I'm always careful to patch test and then I still can have trouble but this worked fine. Loaded with serum, there is plenty to pat in when the mask comes off. As usual, I had a bit of trouble getting the mask in exactly the right place and had to fiddle with it a bit but once it's in place it stays.

title: Good moisturizer/firmer
text: Seems to work but my neck definitely needs more help than I'll get from a cream. Moisturizes well and absorbs nicely. My sensitive skin didn't have any trouble. I did notice some improvement but it doesn't last through the day.

title: Does a good job.
text: Easy to use and blends well. The dark color was a little darker than I would have liked but that's a color issue. The lighter color works well. Does the job.

title: Great idea, less than stellar delivery.
text: While I love the idea of this, the actual product just isn't there yet. The charge didn't last long enough to get my hair done (I do have long and thick hair) so YMMV but the second time I tried to use it, it seems that the charge didn't even last as long as the first. Too much trouble for me. I was hoping for a true rechargeable product which would be excellent--if only this one delivered.

title: Very nice!
text: I really liked using these. They seemed to have a really good effect, without irritating my very sensitive skin. I'm always worried when I try something new -- I get redness, irritation and in bad cases hives so trying anything is a risk. I had absolutely NO problems with these and they left my skin feeling soft and supple and well moisturized.

title: Decent Quality - Nice Feel
text: I got these to add to my travel bag so I don't have to keep taking my regular brushes in and out. These are good quality brushes, are soft and smooth and I didn't have any stray bristles anywhere. Overall very satisfactory. I'm happy I got them, they are getting used frequently and it certainly saves time to have 2 sets.

title: Easy to use and the mister works
text: I travel a lot and find that using a mister for a lot of things makes it easier. The problem has always been that the bottles leak or don't mist. These work perfectly and don't leak!

title: Body Mist
text: I’m using this for my body oil and it’s working perfectly. I wasn’t sure it would go through the sprayer but it does and it makes it so much easier to use. It’s a bit messy getting it started (oil you know) but once I got it primed, it’s working fine and I can spray when I finish in the shower and reach my back without help.

title: Bigger than I expected
text: I’ve been looking for a shower cap for a long time that is sturdy, the right size and doesn’t wear out after a few uses. This is promising although it’s bigger than I need/want - I’ll still use it until something better comes along. It is adjustable so it’s very usable just way oversized for my head and the amount of hair I have. It is lightweight and water proof and dries quickly so other than size, it’s great.

title: They work ok on natural nails
text: These work okay on natural nails but they don't seem to last as long as some of my older ones that are still in use years later. I generally only use them to touch up rough edges or file down broken nails but I couldn't swear to their durability. I can't imagine them working well on acrylics or gels but since I'm not using either right now I can only attest to the fact that they are working on my natural nails and seem to work okay I'm just not sure about their durability.

title: Nice and washes clean
text: This is a great Aloe Gel. I keep in the fridge and use it regularly. It’s light enough weight that it doesn’t feel goopy and washes off clean. Very thick, nice and cold from the fridge and it’s great for too much sun or too much kitchen (burns, cuts, grease spatters, etc.). Easy to use - no nasty smell and works.

title: If you really want to relax
text: I had a bit of trouble in the beginning getting this set exactly right for me but once it was set up (and I marked the spots the suction cups go onto) it's been a wonder. No more sore neck while soaking. I was worried about it staying damp but it doesn't. I do remove it when I'm not relaxing but it fits very nicely in my linen closet so it's only a second away.

title: Effective
text:
I've been watching as every personality is raving about rose quartz and jade and microneedling etc. I did some research (from reputable sources) and there is actually some science to the use of these products. The microneedle blade is small enough for use. It makes little tiny, non-noticeable holes in the surface of your skin (in effect damaging it) so it will produce more collagen. While I wouldn't use it more than once a week, and just until my skin starts to get red, it does appear that my skin is softer and smoother after the treatment. So I'm find on the micro-needler. (Just remember gently, gently). The quartz roller is supposed to reduce redness, smooth the surface of the skin and help with lymphatic drainage. I'm not sure it actually does all that but it does feel nice and has definitely helped with under eye puffiness so it appears to be working. I'm very pleasantly surprised by the effectiveness of these devices and will continue to use them.

The packaging is fine and makes them giftable but I'm not sure the quality of the pieces will actually hold up. I've been using them for several months and so far so good but if they do fall apart, I'm willing to invest in more expensive products. For a starter set, I would give this a try to be sure it works for you (and you are willing to do it).

title: Wasn't sure but was surprisingly effective
text: I wasn't really sure about this and when I first opened it I became even more skeptical. It looked like a paper towel and I had to wet it? Fortunately I thought ahead and opened it before soaking it in water and it was relatively easy to handle. I didn't love wearing it for 30 minutes, I got annoyed by then with the masque but 20 minutes was about my limit and I did see results. I liked the masque overall and it seemed to improve the tone and texture of my skin. I knocked off a point because it was a bit cumbersome to use and waiting around for 30 minutes seemed too much for me. I've got very sensitive skin and this was not of problem for me to use (although I did patch test first). If you know what you are going into (the time and effort) I'd recommend this product. If you don't have the time or want to bother with soaking the masque first, try something else but this does work!

title: Not impressed.
text: There are a number of this type of product on the market and this one does not compare favorably to any others that I’ve tried. They don’t hold well and I didn’t notice any improvement. I’ll keep shopping.

title: It Works!
text: Once I got comfortable using this, the hand part felt weird at first, I've seen decent results. I do use a cellulite gel and this brush and I can really see an improvement. I used the same combination a couple years ago and was very happy with my results but I fell by the wayside - I'm back and I'll continue to use it forever. Between the gel and the brush, the action of using the brush is the most important and I noticed results after a couple of weeks.

title: Nice scrub.
text: Nice scrub with a pleasant scent. Easy to use, extremely gentle, and I was using on one side only so I can see a difference after about 3 or 4 uses.  Feels good, works well and no bad after effects, what more do you need?

title: Does not work as intended
text:
It is a thin piece of wire inside a cloth. Once twisted the clip loses shape - does not give desired effect, AND difficult to bring back to the original shape.

Not worth the money.

title: Great
text: Great

title: Stamping Game Changer
text: I am not new to nail stamping, but I only recently became aware of She Modern Sticky Stamping Polishes. With traditional stamping polish it is necessary to work very quickly in order to successfully transfer the image onto the nail, and beginners frequently struggle to get the timing down. Even experienced stampers have difficulties with extremely fine lines or highly detailed images; the stamping polish just dries too quickly inside the very shallow etching. After watching several She Modern videos on YouTube and ordering a small set of sticky stamping polishes, I was eager to test them out on a stamping plate I’ve been unsuccessfully trying to use for over a year. My very first effort was flawless! The She Modern performed perfectly. Beginners will definitely find these polishes far, far easier to work with as they learn the basics, and more advanced stampers can enhance their artwork by using pigment powders, foils, and glitter. In addition, She Modern offers a comprehensive selection of watercolor polishes for techniques such as lead lining, reverse stamping, etc. The only limit is your imagination and She Modern even helps with that by providing live demonstrations of their products and techniques on YouTube every Tuesday and Friday. Tina very thoroughly and patiently opens each session by answering any questions from attendees before creating a nail design with various products. It’s very helpful to see them in use and gives you ideas for your own nail art. It’s a great line of products for nail artists at ANY skill level and the product support is outstanding!

title: Great
text: It is exactly as described and perfect for young boys. Bought this for my 5 yr old

title: This Is A Great Design- But Caution, How To Get Out Of A Jam
text:
I have baby fine hair. Thin hair makes it difficult to curl my hair because either they are too hot, to large, hair gets caught in clips, or other reasons. As a result, I don't curl my hair often. This might change that.

CHARGING
Charging this took 3 hours once I got it. It has a gauge on it which lets you know when the battery is full and status of it.

CONTROL PANEL
The control panel is covered in the instructions, but it is not quite what it is described. I found it very intuitive, however and no problem in using it. Just mess with the buttons and you will figure it out. The right button changes the section, the left button chooses the level.

SETTING
Every time I turn this off, I have to reset it to F instead of C and then I have to reset the different times too. It does not remember so far every time I have used it and I have tried multiple ways.

CURLING
This thing is AWESOME. The thing is you have to have SMALL pieces of hair and make sure no other hairs are caught with it. If you don't then it will curl your hair tight and jam it up. More on that later. I set my hair for baby fine at 300F and 8 seconds and once it heated up, the curls were perfect. I had to redo a few of them but for the most part they were nice.

JAM
When you are not careful to separate ALL hair from a section, sometimes the shorter hairs will catch in the roller in the opposite direction and it will cause a jam. It is scary. That is one reason why I set it only at 8 seconds. All you do is make sure you have a mirror and then hit the controls until you reverse the direction and run it for a moment and VOILA- hair is out.

Make sure to comb the hair and then redo it in smaller sections.

TIMER
One more thing, this will roll up your hair and then it will beep each second of the count down of your hair in the roller. It gives a long beep when done, you release the button and your hair comes out.

THE BOTTOM LINE
This is a great curling iron. I love that I can do this in the living room with a mirror and not have to stand in the bathroom. My hair looks natural and beautiful.

MY RATING
FOUR STARS I wish this would set itself to Farenheit and stay there. It is annoying to reset it every time. I know it is supposed to stay, but mine doesn't. Other than that, this would get five stars, but I am taking one off for that.

PHOTO
I posted a photo of my hair so you can see how curly it is. Keep in mind, I have very little hair and it is very very fine. This curling iron really make my hair look amazing.

title: For Oily Problem Skin Yes, For Drier Skin, Feels Dried Out And Tight
text:
HOW THIS COMES
This bar of soap comes wrapped in plastic with a label on each side.

TEXTURE
This bar of soap is very crumbly before unwrapped. The soap feels like it will crumble but when you put water on it, it turns into a very muddy bar of soap. You can feel the mud in it.

CLEANING
This does clean the skin well, but if you have normal to dry skin, it really does make it feel stripped and tight when done using it.

INGREDIENTS
There is nothing in this bar of soap to indicate its ingredients other than Dead Sea Mud.

COUNTRY OF ORIGIN
Israel

WHO MIGHT LIKE THIS
Anyone with very dirty greasy skin or who has problems with oil and blemishes might be able to use this.

THE BOTTOM LINE
This bar of soap does not list ingredients but you can definitely feel there is a lot of mud in it. It cleans well but strips the skin.

MY RATING
FOUR STARS. No ingredient list took a star off for me. The performance is good for some skin, but mine is more on the normal to dry side so I don't use it as much as the guys do.

title: VERY Small Bottle, But Works Well
text:
I have been looking for some shampoos to help with cleaning hair, but also making the scalp heal for nice hair growth and also flaking.

HOW THIS COMES
This comes wrapped tight in plastic with the pump down.

HOW TO USE
Once the plastic is open, you turn the pump to make it pop up and then you can dispense the shampoo.

SIZE
The bottle is only 6 inches from the base to the top of the pump. It is pretty small.

SCENT
My mom found a really old bottle of shampoo in her attic that was by Fabrege called Farrah Fawcett shampoo. This scent reminds me of that. It is a really nice smelling shampoo.

SCALP
I did feel some tingling in my scalp when using this. It did not burn or hurt at all, it felt nice.

HAIR CLEAN?
I have very fine hair which is easily weighed down. It is hard to find a shampoo that encourages volume, does not make my hair look flat, and that does not make it full of static. This shampoo leaves my hair clean for a few days and it somewhat encourages waves. I can not comment on static, as it is not near winter yet. My hair was not left dry or frizzy at all.

THE BOTTOM LINE
This is a nice shampoo. It is a small bottle, but a little bit goes a long way. It makes my scalp feel better and leaves my hair nice and clean.

MY RATING
FIVE STARS. I wish the bottle was not so small, but I do like the shampoo. I was going to give this to my daughter (she has scalp issues) but I think I will buy her a 2nd one and keep this one for me.

title: This Line Continues To Impress Me (I Have Tried Many High End Products)
text:
I have tried many high end skin products over time and I also make my own skin care which I use a lot as well. Once in a while I like to check out another line to trade off for a while. This line, Wow. I am impressed so far.

HOW THIS COMES
This comes in a box. The bottle inside is glass with a lock pump top. Turn to the side and you can pump and then turn it back and it locks.

TEXTURE OF THE LOTION
This is what I would think of as a lotion texture. Thick, but not too thick.

MY SKIN TYPE
I tend to have normal to dry skin and it has some uneven patches on it which most probably don't notice, but I do.

HOW I USE THIS
I start with the XXI cleanser which is great stuff. Then I apply a Hyaluronic Acid serum on my skin. After that, I use this Vitamin C lotion and I finish with the XXI firming lotion on top of that. I only do this 1 time at night.

RESULTS
The results of this product line have been really impressive. My face has looked younger, more glowy, and my skin looks more awake and less tired. I have been through a lot of deaths this year and my face has looked very tired. I could not believe how much this and the other two XXI products affected how I look. It was quite exciting for me right now.

THE BOTTOM LINE
My skin glows after using this. It is soft, moisturized and when combined with the other XXI cleanser and firming lotion, the results are impressive.

MY RATING
FIVE STARS. I will continue to buy products from this line (well the ones I mentioned, anyway). I really have been thankful to have them right now. They have given me a boost when I really needed one.

title: Perfect For Baby Fine Hair (Even Adults)
text:
I have baby fine hair. That means that although I can make it look like I have quite a bit of hair, in reality, my pony tail is the size of a watercolor brush. I need hair ties that can pull my hair back, stay put, and not destroy what hair I do have.

HOW THESE COME
These come in a plastic bag.

COLOR
The colors are all brilliant neon which I LOVE, except the blue- I would call it neon navy if that were a thing.

PERFORMANCE
These work perfectly for me. I use them alone on hot days and even have them stay put during exercise and activity. They do not tear out my hair when I remove them either.

THE BOTTOM LINE
These hair bands are perfect for me. I have baby fine hair and not as much of it as it looks, so having these is perfect. They also work well for kids.

MY RATING
FIVE STARS. I am thrilled to have these. Most other hair bands slide out easily and frustrate me. These stay put most of the time.

title: GReat Bronzer For Medium To Lighter Skin Tones, But Great Eye Shadow Too- Read On
text:
As a makeup artist, I am always trying to find ways to get the most mileage out of the products that I use. This bronzer had some surprises to it. Read on..

PHOTO- My photo has swatches of both color 1 and 2 which are labeled. I tried to get accurate photos colorwise and it is hard to do as the camera does not capture the nuances. When applied with a brush, the effect is MUCH lighter.

WHAT IS THIS LIKE?
COMPACT
The compact is a high layered cardboard with a strong hinge to it. There is no mirror and the pan inside has the product with designs pressed into it. It does not come with a brush.

WHAT IS THE COLOR LIKE?
This color is more of a bronze gold color. It is still on the cooler side, but light warmer skin tones could use this too.

TYPE OF SKIN TESTED ON?
This was tested on both MAC translation of skin tones NW 25 (which is what you see in the photos) and NC37 which is a more tan but cooler skin tone.

HOW TO APPLY?
This applies well but you have to be sure you find the right brush. A stippling brush was the best way to get a natural look from this bronzer and highlighter. It allows for subtle application so that it does not look like you have on too much. If you use too dense of a brush, it is easy to get a stripe of glow on your face that others will see and it can really look odd. You also need to get a fresh brush and blend it very well into your skin. Apply this in the backwards 3 figure on each side of your face. Imagine two 3s in a mirror image on your face with the tips and centers touching.

ANY OTHER USES?
I found that this also makes a fabulous eye shadow. I found it to be a perfect match with the other color in this series of number 2 which is a darker more rose brown color. This is a great companion to that. If this is all you have, It also makes a great eye shadow alone or with another lighter satin finish shadow or even a matte. I would not go super frosty.

HOW TO APPLY TO EYES
In terms of eyes, you can use this as a contour, all over color, or in combination with the other darker color of this Sungasm series or another set of shadows. The application is best for a lighter look to use a teardrop shaped brush. Then for a heavier look with more color, a flat eye shadow brush packing this gently into place over a good eye primer is the way to go. For a quick application, you can also use a finger to apply and blend it with a brush or your finger

ANY IRRITATION PROBLEMS?
I am VERY sensitive and did not have any problems with this product on the face or eyes.

THE BOTTOM LINE
As long as you are willing to take some time to find the right brush for the application of this, this bronzer is a pretty color especially for cooler toned skin. It is a good highlighter for darker skin tones as a highlighter, though. This is beautiful on the face, eyes, and in tandem with the other color of this bronzer too.

MY RATING
FIVE STARS. This is a nice bronzer and I am surprised at how well it works on cooler skin tones, something that is not all that easy to find, especially in TWO colors of a collections.

title: Nice As Bronzer On Cooler Toned Skin, But Fabulous Eye Shadow Too,- Read On
text:
I am a makeup artist. I am always finding ways to make cosmetics work for all sorts of uses to get the best look and bang for the buck. This Luminating Bronzer has some surprises up its sleeve.

WHAT IS THIS LIKE?
COMPACT
This comes in a heavy cardboard compact with a strong cardboard hinge on it. There is no mirror. The pan inside has printed letters and design on it. In this case, the color is number 2, the darker of the two in this collection.

WHAT COLOR IS THIS?
This bronzer is a unique color. Instead of being the usual brown or orange color so many bronzers are, this one is a rose toned base which at first seems unusual. If used on cooler toned skin, you will still see a luminzer effect but the undertone is more of a rose tan.

WHAT COLOR SKIN DID I USE THIS ON?
Right now, I tried this on two colors of skin. One was translated into MAC foundation color as NC27- a tanned color which leans toward the cooler side, and NW25 which is a cooler lighter caucasian leaning color.

EFFECTS?
Things like this have a need for you to choose the right brush. The wrong brush can make it look horrible. The right brush can make it look like a million bucks. When used with a STIPPLING brush (look that up to find out what that means), this bronzer provides the perfect luminescence and glow along with color.

You can see the cheekbones highlighted and see the spot of color, but it is subtle, and not overbearing.

If you use the dense fluffy brush like you might use to apply blush, the results border on ridiculous. It is like you have smears of bright shimmer on and it is hard to blend in well.

WHAT OTHER USES?
Interestingly, I have both color 1 and 2 of this line of Sungasm bronzers. When using this particular color 2 on the creases of the eyes, it provides a GORGEOUS natural look similar to the old J Lo type look or other natural based looks which in reality take a lot of makeup but they just don't look like it.

This put together with color 1 in this series, the two together make a great duo on the eyes. It really is amazing. It brings out the color of the eyes perfectly. In fact, I use the lighter one on the upper cheekbones for highlight/bronzer and the darker number 2 under it and blend well. The effect is subtle but beautiful.

HOW TO APPLY TO EYES
I have used good shadow brushes and my finger as well. The idea is for medium to subtle color, use a tear drop shaped shadow brush. For more intensity use a flat eye shadow brush on top of eye primer and blend once you have applied the other colors. For a quick application, I have successfully used my fingers.

DOES IT BURN ON THE EYES?
I have a terrible time with products on my eyes. They usually burn and give me trouble. This bronzer did not do that. If you are concerned, be sure to get a good eye primer that you are comfortable with and use that first on your eyes.

WHAT ABOUT DARKER SKIN TONES?
If you use this on darker skin tones, there is a good chance it could show up a bit on the ghostly side. It has to be applied very lightly and blended well a little at a time to test the best depth if you want to try it.

THE BOTTOM LINE
Not only as a gorgeous rose based bronzer highlighter, but also as a contour or all over eye shadow, this color bronzer is a great price with good performance. It is not the usual color for bronzers but it works on medium to lighter skin tones.

MY RATING
FIVE STARS. This is a great multi purpose product for summer. It doubles as bronzer and luminzer but also as a great eye shadow.

title: Halloween Or Messing Around Okay, But Serious Wear, Not So Much
text:
I have been working with wigs for quite a few years now. One thing I know is a good quality vs not so great quality wig. Let's take a look at this one.

WHAT IS THIS LIKE?

HAIR
This wig has some great hair. the colors are definitely platinum white and what I would call light auburn base hairs. The white hairs are about 1/3 or so longer than the auburn hairs. There is a nice kink to the hairs.

THICKNESS
That is where this wig is sadly lacking. At the top, the wefts of hair are way too far apart. The lace in the cap is a very light butter colored yellow. The hair is not too thin, but it is not quite thick enough to cover hair below. Yes, this comes with a nylon cap, but it just is not comfortable with those. If you have dark hair it will definitely show the bright colored lace and elastics through the wig when the wind blows.

BANGS/STYLE
That is where this wig is just not practical unless you don't mind looking stupid for a party or Halloween. The bangs are WAY too long for anyone to wear. That usually would not be a problem, but what you will get instead of the cool light ends on the entire head is chopped bang that is bland looking and then these white cool looking ends around the head. The bangs are best cut painstakingly so that the auburn is cut way shorter (about 2/3) than the white hairs. That takes a lot of time but worth the effort. Then you have to cut them at a staggered manner.

Other than the bangs being hard to trim so you can at least function with this wig on, the overall style is fabulous. I love how it falls and looks while on the head.

ELASTIC BANDS
Inside the wig, there are elastic bands with hooks to help hold the wig on the head. You might want to take them down to the spot you like it in as the hooks have a tendency to come undone during wearing.

WHAT I WANT IN A WIG
Believe it or not, I would actually wear a wig like this with the right outfit, and not to be silly either. I prefer wigs that look authentic,, and can be worn realistically as well as for fun.

1. I have to be able to see out of it
2. I have to be able to wear it comfortably without fussing
3. I want it to not have my real hair showing
4. I want it to look realistic
5. I want it to last for quite a few wearings

DOES THIS WIG PASS THE TEST?
I am giving this wig THREE stars because it is hard to wear and see. In order to trim this in a realistic manner, I have to take a LOT of time and that takes stars off for me. I happen to love the style and coloring, so I am wiling to put the work into it, but honestly, I think it should be a bit shorter in the bangs area since it is so hard to trim and keep it looking real. Also, the wefting on the top is just a bit too widely spaced. I wish also that the cap was made with light auburn lace and elastic instead of the icy yellow colors.

THE BOTTOM LINE
If you want to wear this for fun, it will be hard to see and hard to trim and not look silly in this. It is comfortable and the style is epic, but there will be work required. You can bandana it to help, but it still will look a bit floppy unless trimmed a little bit in the bangs/fringe area. I like this, but it takes work to wear and not look silly for me.

MY RATING
THREE STARS. The trimming of the bangs is VERY time consuming since we only have one shot at it and if it is screwed up, then the wig is toast. I wish there was more hair on top and that the lace cap did not show as easily. A darker cap underneath (light auburn color) would have been much nicer with this. I will still use this, but it could have been a bit nicer with small inexpensive changes.

title: Used For Watercolors, It Works Well For Small Details
text:
I have a set of Kolinsky sable brushes which moths got at a while ago and I have been wanting to replace them. This was a perfect shape for me, so I got it. Let's see what happened.

WHAT IS THIS LIKE?
This has a wood handle for nails or even watercolor painting- it is a nice solid wood handle. The brush itself is a teardrop shape with a very fine point. The ferrule is average, nothing WOW, but not awful either.

HOW DOES THIS PERFORM?
This brush has a nice pocket in it which absorbs the watercolor when using it. It will gradually disperse the paint in a nice thin line, but it does make it so I don't have to dip it as constantly as with a narrow brush. As for smoothness of lines and how it paints, I really like it. It is great for small areas of paintings.

CLEANING
I clean this regularly in the same product that I use for cleaning wool when it is time to store it. It has deterrent to moths in it. Other than that, I just clean with water most of the time and only use the other stuff when i am going to put it away for any length of time.

THE BOTTOM LINE
Although this can be used for nails, I prefer it for watercolor. I like nail brushes out of synthetic brushes instead of real sable.

MY RATING
FIVE STARS. This works for what I want it for in doing watercolors. It is not quite as nice as the Kolinsky Sable brushes I lost, but it is a nice fill in for now. I would buy it again.

title: Seems To Work, But I Think Mine Might Be Going Rancid
text:
I am all about natural skin care. When I read about this product and the lovely smell it had, I was very excited to try it. Let's take a look.

WHAT IS THIS LIKE?
This cream is yellow in color- very pale yellow. It is creamy but not heavy. There is a very faint lemon smell, but there is also a smell which is not good- almost like the oils in the cream are about to turn completely rancid. They are not quite there yet, but I have used enough products over time where I recognize that smell.

That is not necessarily the fault of the cream. This could have been kept in a hot warehouse too long, or who knows what. The manufacture date on my box is April 2019. That is over a year old already.

HOW DOES IT WORK?
Since it is not unbearable at this point, I wanted to at least test the product for a few days. There was no burning or stinging, so it is still okay to use for now. The product is quite nice. It does soak in quickly and it does not leave the face greasy at all.

WHAT IS THE EFFECT ON SKIN?
The next morning after using this, I will say that the skin is left looking like it has a slight glow to it. It does leave the skin looking much nicer than other creams I have used. It is warmer weather right now and this cream is still not leaving the face greasy or heavy at all. My skin is definitely left looking nice the next morning.

ANY SENSITIVITY?
I have not had any sensitivity to the sun or anything else yet. Like I said, I can not use this long as it is ready to turn bad soon so I only have a short time. For now, it is really nice.

THE BOTTOM LINE
I really wish that this cream was fresher than it is. The product manufacture date on it is April of 2019. I am really disappointed that I could not test it at its best because it has great potential to be a really nice cream.

MY RATING
FOUR STARS- I can not give this five stars in its current state. It is potentially really nice cream though. If you get a fresh one, I imagine it is really nice. Just make sure to use it up and if you live in a hot climate, keep it in the refrigerator or air conditioning.

title: Simple Scent Free Skin Care Absorbs Easily Does It Do What It Says?
text:
I am always on the lookout for really nice simple skin care. Let's take a look at this ampule.

WHAT IS THIS LIKE?
This is a clear solution that comes out with an eye dropper.

HOW TO USE
The idea is that you use a toner on your CLEAN face, apply this to the face and neck and chest, and then follow up with a moisturizer.

WHAT DOES IT PROMISE TO DO?
This promises to lighted dark spots, and add firmness, glow, and hydration.

DOES IT DO WHAT IT SAYS?
I used this with another Korean toner which is pretty simple, and also the BE PLAIN Aqua moisturizer. When used, this did not seem to moisturize that much on its own, and for brightness and glow, I would say not over WOW factor after using for a month.

DID SKIN LOOK FIRMER?
I guess you could say my skin looked a bit firmer, but nothing so dramatic that people said, "WOW, WHAT ARE YOU USING ON YOUR FACE?"

THE BOTTOM LINE
This is a scent free, easy to use serum for the face. It works well with moisturizer, is simple, scent free, and gives a moderate amount of what it says it will do. It is not remarkable, but it is not terrible either.

MY RATING
FOUR STARS. This is decent, but not my favorite product at this point.

title: Not Quite As Nice As I Had Hoped- BLINDING At Times
text:
I was spoiled. I had a wonderful big compact mirror from OTT LITE some time ago. I used it a lot. However, it broke and I could not replace it. I was hoping Let's take a look.

WHAT IS THIS LIKE?
This mirror closes and snaps shut with a plastic clip on it. It says open, but honestly, it is not easy to do. Once open, the inside has the 10X magnifier on one side and the reguiar mirror surrounded by the light ring.

ON/OFF
This has one light brightness- on. There is a little switch on the back that you push from one side to the other to turn it on and off. It does not shut the light off when you close it.

CASE
The case is quite slick. If it is cold out and my hands are cold, it is sometimes a bit tough to hold on to this. Most of the time it is not a problem.

BRIGHTNESS
This is a bit too bright for me. It really does seem to be so bright that I can not look into the regular mirror long, but the magnifier is okay IF I REALLY WANT TO SEE MY PORES. Sorry, but it is a bit overwhelming.

BATTERIES
This takes 2 CR2032 batteries.

THE BOTTOM LINE
I am not really that impressed with this mirror. It works, but it is a bit frustrating to open, and bright to look into.

MY RATING
THREE STARS. This works, but it is not the best light in my opinion. That little switch on the back could easily be damaged in my purse.

title: Removes Regular (Not Gel) Tough Polish Well, Does Not Leave Nails Parched
text:
When it comes to nail polish remover, I have two choices. I use either the store brand, or professional brand, which is often pure acetone used in tough removal like gel polish. Let's look at this one.

WHAT TYPE OF POLISH?
I had on a very dark red polish which was wearing very intensely for a week. Removal with some removers would leave red stains everywhere.
